spec_preview:
---- MODULE DekkersAlgorithm ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES turn, wants

Init == /\ turn = 0
        /\ wants = [i \in 1..2 |-> FALSE]

Next == \/ /\ wants[1] = FALSE
          /\ wants[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = 1
          /\ wants' = wants
      \/ /\ wants[1] = TRUE
          /\ wants[2] = FALSE
          /\ turn' = 2
          /\ wants' = wants
      \/ /\ wants[1] = TRUE
          /\ wants[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = turn
          /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE, ![2] = FALSE]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, wants>>

TypeOK == /\ turn \in 1..2
          /\ wants \in [1..2 -> BOOLEAN]

Safety == \A i, j \in 1..2 : i /= j => ~(turn = i /\ wants[i] /\ wants[j])

Liveness == \A i \in 1..2 : []<> (turn /= i \/ wants[i] = FALSE)

====

spec_preview:
---- MODULE GossipRumor ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANTS N, MaxRounds
VARIABLES known, round


vars == <<known, round>>

Init == /\ known = [i \in 1..N |-> {i}]
        /\ round = 0

Next == /\ round < MaxRounds
        /\ \E i, j \in 1..N : i /= j
            /\ known' = [known EXCEPT ![i] = known[i] \cup known[j]]
            /\ round' = round + 1
        /\ \A k \in 1..N : known'[k] = known[k]
        /\ round' = round

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == /\ known \in [1..N -> SUBSET 1..N]
          /\ round \in 1..MaxRounds

====

spec_preview:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES state

Init == \A i \in 1..N : state[i] = "idle"

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ state[i] = "idle" \/ state[i] = "critical"
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "critical"]

Spec == Init /\ []([Next]_state)

THEOREM MutualExclusion == Spec => [](\A i, j \in 1..N : i /= j => state[i] # "critical" \/ state[j] # "critical")
====

spec_preview:
---- MODULE PetersonsAlgorithm ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS P1, P2
VARIABLES flag, turn


vars == <<flag, turn>>

Init == /\ flag = [i \in 0..1 |-> FALSE]
        /\ turn = 0

Next == \/ /\ flag[0] = FALSE
           /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![0] = TRUE]
           /\ turn' = 1
           /\ UNCHANGED turn
        \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
           /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = TRUE]
           /\ turn' = 0
           /\ UNCHANGED turn
        \/ /\ flag[0] = TRUE
           /\ flag[1] = TRUE
           /\ turn \in 0..1
           /\ turn' = turn
           /\ UNCHANGED flag

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == /\ vars \in [flag: [0..1 -> BOOLEAN], turn: 0..1]
          /\ turn \in 0..1

====

spec_preview:
---- MODULE Barrier ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES N, barrier, count

Init == /\ N \in Nat
        /\ N > 0
        /\ barrier \in 1..N
        /\ count = 0

Next == /\ count' = count + 1
        /\ count' <= N

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<N, barrier, count>>

====

spec_preview:
---- MODULE PetersonsAlgorithm ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, P1, P2
VARIABLES flag, turn


vars == <<flag, turn>>

Init == /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]
        /\ turn = 1

Next == \/ /\ flag[P1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[P2] = FALSE
          /\ flag = [flag EXCEPT ![P1] = TRUE]
          /\ turn = P1
        \/ /\ flag[P1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[P2] = TRUE
          /\ turn = P2
          /\ flag = [flag EXCEPT ![P2] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[P1] = TRUE
          /\ flag[P2] = FALSE
          /\ turn = P1

---- MODULE ParkingLot ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, CarIDs
VARIABLES occupied, queue


(* Type invariant ensuring variables stay within expected domains *)
TypeOK == 
    /\ occupied \subseteq CarIDs
    /\ queue \in Seq(CarIDs)

(* Initial state: no cars parked, no cars waiting *)
Init == 
    /\ occupied = {}
    /\ queue = <<>>

(* Action: a car enters if there is space and it is at the front of the queue *)
Enter(c) == 
    /\ c \in CarIDs
    /\ ~(c \in occupied)
    /\ Len(queue) < N
    /\ queue[1] = c
    /\ occupied' = occupied \cup {c}
    /\ queue' = Tail(queue)

(* Action: a car leaves if it is currently parked *)
Leave(c) == 
    /\ c \in CarIDs
    /\ c \in occupied
    /\ occupied' = occupied \ {c}
    /\ queue' = queue

                    /\ balance' = balance - amount

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_balance

spec_preview:
---- MODULE Elevator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N
VARIABLES pos, dir, req, doors

Init == /\ pos = 1
        /\ dir = 1
        /\ req = {}
        /\ doors = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ pos' = pos + dir
               /\ dir' = dir
               /\ req' = req
               /\ doors' = FALSE
           \/ /\ pos' = pos
               /\ dir' = dir
               /\ req' = req \ {pos}
               /\ doors' = TRUE

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<pos, dir, req, doors>>

TypeOK == /\ pos \in 1..N
          /\ dir \in {-1, 1}
          /\ req \subseteq 1..N
          /\ doors \in BOOLEAN

====

spec_preview:
---- MODULE GossipRumor ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, T
VARIABLES known, rumor, rumorCount


vars == << known, rumor, rumorCount >>

Init == /\ known = [i \in 1..N |-> {i}]
        /\ rumor = [i \in 1..N |-> i]
        /\ rumorCount = [i \in 1..N |-> 1]

Next == /\ \E i \in 1..N : \E j \in 1..N :
          /\ i /= j
          /\ known' = [known EXCEPT ![i] = known[i] \cup known[j]]
          /\ rumor' = [rumor EXCEPT ![i] = rumor[j]]
          /\ rumorCount' = [rumorCount EXCEPT ![i] = rumorCount[i] + 1]
        /\ UNCHANGED << rumor, rumorCount >>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == /\ rumor \in [1..N -> 1..N]
          /\ rumorCount \in [1..N -> Nat]
          /\ known \in [1..N -> SUBSET 1..N]

====

---- MODULE GossipRumor ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, T
VARIABLES nodes, round, rumor


vars == <<nodes, rumor, round>>

Init == /\ nodes = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]
        /\ rumor = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]
        /\ round = 0

Next == /\ round < T
        /\ \E i \in 1..N : /\ nodes[i] = TRUE
                        /\ \E j \in 1..N : j # i
                        /\ nodes' = [nodes EXCEPT ![j] = TRUE]
                        /\ rumor' = [rumor EXCEPT ![j] = TRUE]
                        /\ round' = round + 1
        \/ \A i \in 1..N : nodes[i] = FALSE
        /\ nodes' = nodes
        /\ rumor' = rumor
        /\ round' = round + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

====

---- MODULE MultiProducerConsumer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Producers, BufferSize
VARIABLES buffer, consState, prodState


(* Producer states *)
ProducerIdle == prodState = [p \in Producers |-> "Idle"]
ProducerProducing == prodState = [p \in Producers |-> "Producing"]

(* Consumer states *)
ConsumerIdle == consState = "Idle"
ConsumerConsuming == consState = "Consuming"

(* Actions *)
ProducerAction(p) == 
    /\ prodState[p] = "Idle"
    /\ prodState' = [prodState EXCEPT ![p] = "Producing"]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<buffer, consState>>

ConsumerAction == 
    /\ consState = "Idle"
    /\ consState' = "Consuming"
    /\ UNCHANGED <<buffer, prodState>>

ProduceItem(p, item) == 
    /\ prodState[p] = "Producing"
    /\ Len(buffer) < BufferSize
    /\ buffer' = Append(bu

spec_preview:
---- MODULE Barrier ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES barrier, count, arrived, released

Init == 
  /\ barrier = 0
  /\ count = 0
  /\ arrived = {}
  /\ released = {}

Next == 
  /\ count' = count + 1
  /\ count = 0
     /\ arrived' = {count}
     /\ released' = {}
  /\ \/ /\ count > 0
        /\ arrived' = arrived \cup {count}
        /\ released' = released
     /\ \/ /\ count > 0
           /\ arrived' = arrived
           /\ released' = released \cup {count}
  /\ barrier' = barrier
  /\ count' = count
  /\ arrived' = arrived
  /\ released' = released

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<barrier, count, arrived, released>>

TypeOK == 
  /\ barrier \in Nat
  /\ count \in Nat
  /\ arrived \subseteq Nat
  /\ released \subseteq Nat

====

spec_preview:
---- MODULE LeaseProtocol ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES lease, holder, time, leaseLength



vars == <<lease, holder, time, leaseLength>>

Init == lease = 0 /\ holder = 0 /\ time = 0 /\ leaseLength = 1

Next == \E node \in 1..2 :
    /\ lease' = IF holder = 0 THEN time + leaseLength ELSE lease
    /\ holder' = IF holder = 0 THEN node ELSE holder
    /\ time' = time + 1
    /\ leaseLength' = leaseLength
    /\ UNCHANGED <<vars - <<lease, holder, time>> >>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == /\ lease \in Int
          /\ holder \in 1..2
          /\ time \in Int
          /\ leaseLength \in Nat

====

spec_preview:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFO ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES q, head, tail

vars == <<q, head, tail>>

TypeOK == 
  /\ q \in Seq(N) \* q is a sequence of integers in [0..N-1]
  /\ head \in 0..N
  /\ tail \in 0..N

Init == 
  /\ q = <<>>
  /\ head = 0
  /\ tail = 0

Next == 
  \E x \in 0..N-1 :
    \/ /\ head < tail
       /\ q[head] = x
       /\ head' = head + 1
       /\ tail' = tail
    \/ /\ head = tail
       /\ q' = Append(q, x)
       /\ head' = head
       /\ tail' = tail + 1
    \/ /\ head > tail
       /\ q[head] = x
       /\ head' = head + 1
       /\ tail' = tail

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

====

           /\ owner' = CHOOSE n \in Nodes : n \in requests
           /\ requests' = requests \ {owner'}

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

          /\ requests \subseteq Nodes

spec_preview:
---- MODULE CircularBuffer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N
ASSUME N > 0

VARIABLES buffer, readPtr, writePtr

Init == /\ buffer = [i \in 0..N-1 |-> 0]
        /\ readPtr = 0
        /\ writePtr = 0

Write == /\ writePtr < N
        /\ buffer' = [buffer EXCEPT ![writePtr] = 1]
        /\ writePtr' = writePtr + 1
        /\ readPtr' = readPtr

Read == /\ readPtr < writePtr
        /\ buffer' = [buffer EXCEPT ![readPtr] = 0]
        /\ readPtr' = readPtr + 1
        /\ writePtr' = writePtr

Next == Write \/ Read

TypeOK == /\ buffer \in [0..N-1 -> 0..1]
          /\ readPtr \in 0..N
          /\ writePtr \in 0..N

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<buffer, readPtr, writePtr>>

====

spec_preview:
---- MODULE CircularBuffer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, BufSize

VARIABLES buf, rptr, wptr

vars == <<buf, rptr, wptr>>

Init == /\ buf = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ rptr = 1
        /\ wptr = 1

TypeOK == /\ rptr \in 1..N
          /\ wptr \in 1..N
          /\ buf \in [1..N -> 1..BufSize]

Next == /\ rptr' = rptr
        /\ wptr' = wptr
        /\ buf' = buf

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

====

spec_preview:
---- MODULE Elevator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES pos, dir, req

Init == /\ pos = 0
        /\ dir = 1
        /\ req = {}

Next == \/ /\ pos' = pos + dir
              /\ dir' = dir
              /\ req' = req
          \/ /\ pos' = pos
              /\ dir' = 1 - dir
              /\ req' = req
          \/ /\ pos' = pos
              /\ dir' = dir
              /\ req' = req \cup {pos}

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<pos, dir, req>>

TypeOK == /\ pos \in 0..N
          /\ dir \in {0, 1}
          /\ req \subseteq 0..N

====

---- MODULE TicketDispenser ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS MAX
VARIABLES c, s, t


vars == <<t, c, s>>

Init == /\ t = 0
        /\ c = 0
        /\ s = 1 .. MAX

Next == \/ /\ t < MAX
            /\ c' = c
            /\ t' = t + 1
            /\ s' = s
        \/ /\ t = MAX
            /\ c' = c
            /\ t' = t
            /\ s' = s \ {c}
        \/ /\ t = MAX
            /\ c' = c + 1
            /\ t' = t
            /\ s' = s

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == /\ t \in 0 .. MAX
          /\ c \in 0 .. MAX
          /\ s \subseteq 1 .. MAX

====

EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Keys, Values

VARIABLES kv

Init == 
  /\ kv = [k \in Keys |-> [v \in Values |-> 0]]

Next == 
  /\ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values :
       /\ kv' = [kv EXCEPT ![k][v] = 1]
       /\ UNCHANGED <<kv>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<kv>>

---- MODULE ResourceAlloc ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES r, waiting, holding

Init == /\ r = 0
        /\ waiting = <<>>
        /\ holding = <<>>

Next == \/ /\ r = 0
              /\ waiting # <<>>
              /\ r' = 1
              /\ holding' = Append(holding, Head(waiting))
              /\ waiting' = Tail(waiting)
          \/ /\ r = 1
              /\ r' = 0
              /\ holding' = Tail(holding)
              /\ waiting' = waiting

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<r, waiting, holding>> 

====

spec_preview:
---- MODULE DistLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Nodes
VARIABLES owner, queue


vars == <<owner, queue>>

Init == /\ owner = 0
        /\ queue = <<>>

Request(node) == /\ owner # node
                 /\ ~(node \in queue)
                 /\ queue' = Append(queue, node)
                 /\ UNCHANGED owner

Acquire(node) == /\ owner = 0
                 /\ Head(queue) = node
                 /\ owner' = node
                 /\ queue' = Tail(queue)
                 /\ UNCHANGED <<owner>>

Release(node) == /\ owner = node
                 /\ owner' = 0
                 /\ UNCHANGED queue

Next == \E node \in Nodes:
          \/ Request(node)
          \/ Acquire(node)
          \/ Release(node)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == /\ owner \in 1..N \/ own

spec_preview:
---- MODULE RingLeader ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, IDs
VARIABLES elected, leader


vars == <<leader, elected>>

Init == /\ leader = 0
       /\ elected = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == /\ \E i \in 1..N : /\ elected[i] = FALSE
                           /\ \A j \in 1..N : j # i => IDs[j] < IDs[i]
                           /\ elected' = [elected EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
                           /\ leader' = i
       \/ \E i \in 1..N : /\ elected[i] = TRUE
                           /\ leader' = leader
                           /\ elected' = elected

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == /\ leader \in 1..N
          /\ elected \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]

====

---- MODULE TicketDispenser ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT MAX
VARIABLES counter, ticket


vars == <<ticket, counter>>

Init == /\ ticket = 1
        /\ counter = 0

Next == /\ ticket' = ticket + 1
        /\ counter' = counter + 1
        /\ ticket' <= MAX

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == /\ ticket \in 1..MAX
          /\ counter \in 0..MAX

====

        /\ cons = 0

          /\ cons' = cons
        \/ /\ prod = 10
          /\ prod' = prod
          /\ buf' = buf
          /\ cons' = cons

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<buf, prod, cons>> 

====

spec_preview:
---- MODULE MinMaxTracker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES min, max, values

Init == 
    /\ min = 0
    /\ max = 0
    /\ values = <<>>

Next == 
    /\ \E val \in Nat :
        /\ min' = IF min = 0 \/ val < min THEN val ELSE min
        /\ max' = IF val > max THEN val ELSE max
        /\ values' = Append(values, val)
    /\ UNCHANGED <<min, max, values>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<min, max, values>>

TypeOK == 
    /\ min \in Nat
    /\ max \in Nat
    /\ values \in Seq(Nat)

====

spec_preview:
---- MODULE LeaseProtocol ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES lease, leaseOwner, leaseExpiry, time

Init == /\ lease = 0
        /\ leaseOwner = {}
        /\ leaseExpiry = 0
        /\ time = 0

Acquire(node, duration) == 
    /\ leaseOwner = {}
    /\ lease = node
    /\ leaseExpiry = time + duration
    /\ leaseOwner' = {node}
    /\ lease' = node
    /\ leaseExpiry' = time + duration
    /\ time' = time + 1

Release(node) == 
    /\ leaseOwner = {node}
    /\ lease = 0
    /\ leaseExpiry = 0
    /\ leaseOwner' = {}
    /\ lease' = 0
    /\ leaseExpiry' = 0
    /\ time' = time + 1

Wait(node) == 
    /\ leaseOwner # {}
    /\ time < leaseExpiry
    /\ leaseOwner' = leaseOwner
    /\ lease' = lease
    /\ leaseExpiry' = leaseExpiry
    /\ time' = time + 1

Next == \/

spec_preview:
---- MODULE DistLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, NodeSet
VARIABLES holder, queue


vars == <<holder, queue>>

Init == /\ holder = 0
        /\ queue = <<>>

Next ==
  /\ \E node \in NodeSet :
        /\ ~(node \in queue)
        /\ node = holder
        \/ node \in queue
  /\ \E node \in NodeSet :
        /\ node \in queue
        /\ node = Head(queue)
        /\ holder' = node
        /\ queue' = Tail(queue)
  /\ \E node \in NodeSet :
        /\ ~(node \in queue)
        /\ node # holder
        /\ ~(node \in queue)
        /\ holder' = holder
        /\ queue' = Append(queue, node)
  /\ \E node \in NodeSet :
        /\ node = holder
        /\ holder' = 0
        /\ queue' = queue
  /\ \E node \in NodeSet :
        /\ ~(node \in queue)
        /\ node # hol

---- MODULE MinMaxTracker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y
Min(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x =< y


VARIABLES min, max, values

Init == /\ min = 0
       /\ max = 0
       /\ values = <<>>

Next == /\ \E v \in Nat : /\ values' = Append(values, v)
                                /\ min' = IF Len(values) = 0 THEN v ELSE Min(Append(values, v))
                                /\ max' = IF Len(values) = 0 THEN v ELSE Max(Append(values, v))
       /\ values' = values
       /\ min' = min
       /\ max' = max

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<min, max, values>>

====

EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N,  \* Number of nodes in the ring, CS
          CS   \* Set of critical section states

VARIABLES token, \* Node currently holding the token, state
          state  \* Vector of node states

vars == << token, state >>

Init == /\ token = 1
        /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]

Next == /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1
        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![token] = 1]
        /\ \A i \in 1..N : i # token => state'[i] = state[i]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == /\ token \in 1..N
          /\ state \in [1..N -> 0..1]
          /\ \A i \in 1..N : state[i] \in CS

====

spec_preview:
---- MODULE Peterson ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES turn, flag

Init == /\ turn = 0
        /\ flag = [i \in {1, 2} |-> FALSE]

Next == \/ /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = TRUE]
          /\ turn' = 2
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ turn' = turn
          /\ flag' = flag
      \/ /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = TRUE]
          /\ turn' = 1
          /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ turn' = turn
          /\ flag' = flag
      \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ turn' = turn
          /\ flag' = flag

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, flag>>

TypeOK == /\ turn \in {1, 2}
          /\ flag \in [ {1, 2} -> BOOLEAN ]

====

---- MODULE BankAccount ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES balance

Init == balance = 0

Deposit(amount) == /\ amount \in Nat
                    /\ balance' = balance + amount

Withdraw(amount) == /\ amount \in Nat
                    /\ amount <= balance
                    /\ balance' = balance - amount

Next == \E amount \in Nat : Deposit(amount) \/ Withdraw(amount)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_balance

====

spec_preview:
---- MODULE MinMaxTracker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y
Min(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x =< y


VARIABLES min, max, values

Init == /\ min = 0
        /\ max = 0
        /\ values = <<>>

Next == /\ \E v \in Nat : /\ values' = Append(values, v)
                     /\ min' = IF values = <<>> THEN v ELSE Min(Append(values, v))
                     /\ max' = IF values = <<>> THEN v ELSE Max(Append(values, v))
        /\ values' = values
        /\ min' = min
        /\ max' = max

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<min, max, values>>

====

spec_preview:
---- MODULE Elevator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N
VARIABLES pos, dir, reqs

TypeOK == /\ pos \in 1..N
          /\ dir \in {1, -1}
          /\ reqs \subseteq 1..N

Init == /\ pos = 1
        /\ dir = 1
        /\ reqs = {}

Next == \/ /\ pos = N
              /\ dir' = -1
              /\ pos' = pos
              /\ reqs' = reqs
          \/ /\ pos = 1
              /\ dir' = 1
              /\ pos' = pos
              /\ reqs' = reqs
          \/ /\ pos' = pos + dir
              /\ dir' = dir
              /\ reqs' = IF pos' \in reqs THEN reqs \ {pos'} ELSE reqs

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<pos, dir, reqs>>

====

spec_preview:
---- MODULE SimpleCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, participants
VARIABLES state, votes


vars == <<state, votes>>

Init == /\ state = "init"
        /\ votes = [p \in participants |-> "unknown"]

Next == 
  \/ /\ state = "init"
     /\ \E p \in participants :
        /\ state' = "vote"
        /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![p] = "yes"]
  \/ /\ state = "vote"
     /\ \E p \in participants :
        /\ state' = "vote"
        /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![p] = "no"]
  \/ /\ state = "vote"
     /\ \A p \in participants : votes[p] = "yes"
     /\ state' = "commit"
     /\ votes' = votes
  \/ /\ state = "vote"
     /\ \E p \in participants : votes[p] = "no"
     /\ state' = "abort"
     /\ votes' = votes

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

====

spec_preview:
---- MODULE ReadersWriters ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES readers, writer

Init == /\ readers = 0
        /\ writer = FALSE

AcquireReader == /\ readers < N
                 /\ readers' = readers + 1
                 /\ writer' = writer

AcquireWriter == /\ readers = 0
                 /\ writer' = TRUE

ReleaseReader == /\ readers > 0
                 /\ readers' = readers - 1
                 /\ writer' = writer

ReleaseWriter == /\ writer = TRUE
                 /\ readers' = readers
                 /\ writer' = FALSE

Next == \/ AcquireReader
        \/ AcquireWriter
        \/ ReleaseReader
        \/ ReleaseWriter

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer>>

TypeOK == /\ readers \in 0..N
          /\ writer \in BOOLEAN

====

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_balance

        /\ inventory = [item \in {"Soda", "Chips", "Candy"} |-> 10]

        /\ insertedCoins = <<>>

InsertCoin(coin) == /\ coin \in {5, 10, 25}
                   /\ insertedCoins' = Append(insertedCoins, coin)
                   /\ balance' = balance + coin
                   /\ UNCHANGED <<inventory, price>>

SelectItem(item) == /\ item \in DOMAIN inventory
                   /\ inventory[item] > 0
                   /\ balance >= price[item]
                   /\ inventory' = [inventory EXCEPT ![item] = @ - 1]
                   /\ balance' = balance - price[item]

---- MODULE RingLeader ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N, IDs
VARIABLES ids, leader, leaderSet, next, nextLeader, prev, prevLeader


vars == <<leader, ids, next, prev, nextLeader, prevLeader, leaderSet>>

Init ==
  /\ leader = 0
  /\ ids = [i \in 1..N |-> i]
  /\ next = [i \in 1..N |-> IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1]
  /\ prev = [i \in 1..N |-> IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1]
  /\ nextLeader = [i \in 1..N |-> IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1]
  /\ prevLeader = [i \in 1..N |-> IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1]
  /\ leaderSet = {}

Next ==
  /\ leader' = leader
  /\ ids' = ids
  /\ next' = next
  /\ prev' = prev
  /\ nextLeader' = nextLeader
  /\ prevLeader' = prevLeader
  /\ leaderSet' = leaderSet
  /\ \E i \in 1..N :
       /\ leader = i
       /\ nextLeader' = [j \in 1..N |-> IF j = i

spec_preview:
---- MODULE GossipRumor ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANTS N, MaxRounds
VARIABLES known, rounds


vars == <<known, rounds>>

Init == /\ known = [i \in 1..N |-> {i}]
       /\ rounds = 0

Next == /\ rounds < MaxRounds
       /\ \E i, j \in 1..N : i /= j
          /\ known' = [k \in 1..N |-> known[k] \cup known[i]]
          /\ rounds' = rounds + 1
       /\ UNCHANGED <<known>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == /\ rounds \in 1..MaxRounds
          /\ known \in [1..N -> SUBSET 1..N]
          /\ \A i \in 1..N : i \in known[i]

====

Init == /\ flag = [i \in 1..2 |-> FALSE]
        /\ turn = 1

  \/ /\ turn = 2
     /\ flag = [i \in 1..2 |-> FALSE]
     /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![P2] = TRUE]
     /\ turn' = 1
  \/ /\ turn = 1
     /\ flag = [i \in 1..2 |-> TRUE]
     /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![P2] = FALSE]
     /\ turn' = 1
  \/ /\ turn = 2
     /\ flag = [i \in 1..2 |-> TRUE]
     /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![P1] = FALSE]

---- MODULE ResourceAlloc ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES owner, requests, grants

Init == /\ owner = 0
        /\ requests = <<>>
        /\ grants = <<>>

Next == \/ /\ owner # 0
              /\ owner' = 0
              /\ requests' = Append(requests, owner)
              /\ grants' = grants
          \/ /\ owner = 0
              /\ owner' = requests[1]
              /\ requests' = Tail(requests)
              /\ grants' = Append(grants, owner')

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<owner, requests, grants>>

====

spec_preview:
---- MODULE MinMaxTracker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y
Min(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x =< y


VARIABLES min, max, values

Init == /\ min = 0
       /\ max = 0
       /\ values = <<>>

Next == /\ \E v \in Nat : v \in values
       /\ \E v \in Nat : ~(v \in values)
       /\ min' = Min(values)
       /\ max' = Max(values)
       /\ values' = Append(values, v)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<min, max, values>>

====

---- MODULE MinMaxTracker ----

VARIABLES min, max, values

Init == /\ min = 0
        /\ max = 0
        /\ values = <<>>

Next == /\ \E v \in Nat : /\ values' = Append(values, v)
                                 /\ min' = IF min = 0 \/ v < min THEN v ELSE min
                                 /\ max' = IF v > max THEN v ELSE max
        /\ values' = values
        /\ min' = min
        /\ max' = max

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<min, max, values>>

====

---- MODULE ResourceAlloc ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES owner, requests

Init == /\ owner = 0
        /\ requests = {}

Next == \/ /\ owner # 0
              /\ owner' = 0
              /\ requests' = {}
          \/ /\ owner = 0
              /\ owner' = CHOOSE r \in requests : r
              /\ requests' = requests \ {owner'}
          \/ /\ owner # 0
              /\ owner' = owner
              /\ requests' = requests

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<owner, requests>> 

====

spec_preview:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFO ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES queue, head, tail, size

vars == <<queue, head, tail, size>>

Init == /\ queue = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1
        /\ size = 0

Next == \/ /\ size < N
          /\ queue' = [queue EXCEPT ![tail] = 1]
          /\ tail' = IF tail = N THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
          /\ size' = size + 1
          /\ head' = head
          /\ queue = queue'
       \/ /\ size > 0
          /\ queue' = queue
          /\ head' = IF head = N THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
          /\ size' = size - 1
          /\ tail' = tail
          /\ queue = queue'

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

====

spec_preview:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFO ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

vars == <<q, head, tail, size>>

Init == /\ q = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1
        /\ size = 0

Enqueue(x) == /\ size < N
              /\ q[tail] = x
              /\ tail' = IF tail = N THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
              /\ size' = size + 1
              /\ head' = head
              /\ UNCHANGED head

Dequeue == /\ size > 0
           /\ head' = IF head = N THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
           /\ size' = size - 1
           /\ tail' = tail
           /\ UNCHANGED tail

Next == \/ \E x \in 1..N: Enqueue(x)
        \/ Dequeue

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

====

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

spec_preview:
---- MODULE LamportsBakeryAlgorithm ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES num, flag

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N : /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
                     /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + Max(num)]
                     /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]
                     /\ UNCHANGED <<num, flag>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

TypeOK == /\ num \in [1..N -> Nat]
          /\ flag \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]

IInv == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Inv == \A i, j \in 1..N : i /= j => (num[i] < num[j] \/ num[i] = 0 \/ num[j] = 0)

====

---- MODULE BoundedStack ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES stack, maxSize

Init == 
    /\ stack = <<>>
    /\ maxSize = 10

Push(x) == 
    /\ Len(stack) < maxSize
    /\ stack' = Append(stack, x)
    /\ UNCHANGED <<maxSize>>

Pop == 
    /\ Len(stack) > 0
    /\ stack' = Tail(stack)
    /\ UNCHANGED <<maxSize>>

Next == 
    \/ \E x \in Nat : Push(x)
    \/ Pop

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<stack, maxSize>>

       /\ \A i \in 1..N : i # token => cs'[i] = 0

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

---- MODULE TicketDispenser ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS MAX

VARIABLES counter, ticket, served

Init == /\ counter = 0
        /\ ticket = 0
        /\ served = {}

Next == /\ counter' = counter
        /\ ticket' = ticket
        /\ served' = served
        \/ /\ ticket < MAX
           /\ ticket' = ticket + 1
           /\ counter' = counter
           /\ served' = served
        \/ /\ ticket = MAX
           /\ counter' = counter + 1
           /\ ticket' = ticket
           /\ served' = served \cup {counter}

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<counter, ticket, served>>

====

---- MODULE LamportsBakeryAlgorithm ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANT N
VARIABLES num, flag

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
        /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
        /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + Max(num)]
        /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]
        /\ UNCHANGED <<>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

TypeOK == /\ num \in [1..N -> Nat]
          /\ flag \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]

IInv == /\ num[1] = 0
        /\ \A i \in 1..N : num[i] <= num[i+1]

Inv == \A i, j \in 1..N : i < j => num[i] <= num[j]

====

spec_preview:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFO ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES queue, head, tail, size

vars == <<queue, head, tail, size>>

Init == /\ queue = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1
        /\ size = 0

Enqueue(x) == /\ size < N
              /\ queue[tail] = x
              /\ tail' = IF tail = N THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
              /\ size' = size + 1
              /\ head' = head

Dequeue == /\ size > 0
           /\ head' = IF head = N THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
           /\ size' = size - 1
           /\ tail' = tail
           /\ queue' = queue

Next == \E x \in 1..N: Enqueue(x) \/ Dequeue

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

====

---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N,  \* Number of nodes, CS
          CS  \* Set of critical section requests

\* State variables
VARIABLE token,  \* Node holding the token, inCS
          inCS   \* Node currently in the critical section

\* Type constraints
TypeOK == /\ token \in 1..N
          /\ inCS \in 1..N \/ inCS = 0

\* Initialization
Init == /\ token = 1
        /\ inCS = 0

\* Next-state relation
Next == /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1
        /\ inCS' = IF token' \in CS THEN token' ELSE inCS

\* Specification
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token, inCS>>

====

    /\ stack' = Tail(stack)
    /\ UNCHANGED <<maxSize>>

Next == 
    \/ \E x \in Nat : Push(x)
    \/ Pop

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<stack, maxSize>>

---- MODULE RingLeader ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, IDs
VARIABLES ids, leader, nextIds, nextLeader


vars == <<leader, nextLeader, ids, nextIds>>

Init == 
    /\ leader = 0
    /\ nextLeader = 0
    /\ ids = [i \in 1..N |-> IDs[i]]
    /\ nextIds = [i \in 1..N |-> IDs[i]]

Next == 
    /\ leader' = leader
    /\ nextLeader' = nextLeader
    /\ ids' = ids
    /\ nextIds' = [i \in 1..N |-> IF i = N THEN ids[1] ELSE ids[i + 1]]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

====

spec_preview:
---- MODULE LamportsBakeryAlgorithm ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANT N

VARIABLES num, flag

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
        /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
        /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + Max(num)]
        /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]
        /\ UNCHANGED <<num, flag>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

TypeOK == /\ num \in [1..N -> Nat]
          /\ flag \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]

IInv == /\ num[1] = 1
        /\ \A i \in 2..N : num[i] = 0

Inv == \A i, j \in 1..N : i # j => num[i] # num[j]

====

spec_preview:
---- MODULE ReadersWriters ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES readers, writer

TypeOK == /\ readers \in 0..N
          /\ writer \in BOOLEAN

Init == /\ readers = 0
        /\ writer = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer = FALSE
            /\ readers' = readers + 1
            /\ writer' = writer
        \/ /\ writer = FALSE
            /\ readers' = readers - 1
            /\ writer' = writer
        \/ /\ writer = FALSE
            /\ readers' = readers
            /\ writer' = TRUE

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer>> /\ TypeOK

====

        /\ max' = IF val > max THEN val ELSE max

TypeOK == /\ min \in Nat
          /\ max \in Nat
          /\ seen \subseteq Nat

VARIABLES min, max, stream

  /\ stream = << >>
  /\ min = 0
  /\ max = 0

Next == 
  /\ stream' = Append(stream, 1)
  /\ min' = IF Len(stream) = 0 THEN 1 ELSE Min(stream')
  /\ max' = IF Len(stream) = 0 THEN 1 ELSE Max(stream')

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<min, max, stream>>

spec_preview:
---- MODULE ReadersWriters ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANTS N

VARIABLE readers, writer

TypeOK == /\ readers \in 0..N
          /\ writer \in BOOLEAN

Init == /\ readers = 0
        /\ writer = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer = FALSE
              /\ readers' = readers + 1
              /\ writer' = FALSE
          \/ /\ writer = FALSE
              /\ readers' = readers - 1
              /\ writer' = FALSE
          \/ /\ writer = FALSE
              /\ readers' = readers
              /\ writer' = TRUE
          \/ /\ writer = TRUE
              /\ readers' = readers
              /\ writer' = FALSE

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer>>

====

Next == 
  /\ \E k \in Kinds : \E v \in Values : \E val \in Values :
        /\ kv' = [kv EXCEPT ![k][v] = val]
        \/ kv' = [kv EXCEPT ![k][v] = 0]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<kv>>

spec_preview:
---- MODULE MinMaxTracker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y
Min(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x =< y

VARIABLES min, max, seen

Init == /\ min = 0
       /\ max = 0
       /\ seen = {}

Next == \E val \in Nat :
       /\ seen' = seen \cup {val}
       /\ min' = IF min = 0 /\ seen = {} THEN val ELSE Min(seen')
       /\ max' = IF max = 0 /\ seen = {} THEN val ELSE Max(seen')

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<min, max, seen>>

====

spec_preview:
---- MODULE BoundedRetransmissionProtocol ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANTS File, MAX_RETRIES, Channel, LostMessage
VARIABLES received, retransmitCount, sent, state

Init ==
    /\ state = 0
    /\ sent = {}
    /\ received = {}
    /\ retransmitCount = 0

Next ==
    /\ state' = state + 1
    /\ sent' = sent \cup {File[state]}
    /\ received' = received \cup {File[state]}
    /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount + 1
    /\ state' <= Len(File)
    /\ retransmitCount' <= MAX_RETRIES

Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, sent, received, retransmitCount>>

TypeOK ==
    /\ state \in 0..Len(File)
    /\ sent \subseteq Channel
    /\ received \subseteq Channel
    /\ retransmitCount \in 0..MAX_RETRIES

====

---- MODULE BoundedRetransmissionProtocol ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE, CHUNK_COUNT, CHUNK_IDS, CHUNK_DATA, CHUNK_TIMEOUT
VARIABLES acked_chunks, retransmit_counts, sent_chunks, state, timer

Init ==
    /\ state = "START"
    /\ sent_chunks = {}
    /\ acked_chunks = {}
    /\ retransmit_counts = [c \in CHUNK_IDS |-> 0]
    /\ timer = [c \in CHUNK_IDS |-> 0]

SendChunk(c) ==
    /\ state = "START"
    /\ c \in CHUNK_IDS
    /\ ~(c \in sent_chunks)
    /\ sent_chunks' = sent_chunks \cup {c}
    /\ retransmit_counts' = [retransmit_counts EXCEPT ![c] = retransmit_counts[c] + 1]
    /\ timer' = [timer EXCEPT ![c] = CHUNK_TIMEOUT]
    /\ state' = "WAIT_ACK"
    /\ UNCHANGED <<acked_chunks, retransmit_counts, timer>>

spec_preview:
---- MODULE GossipRumor ----
EXTENDS Integers, FiniteSets, Sequences, TLC

CONSTANTS N, ROUNDS
VARIABLES rumor, gossip

Init == /\ rumor = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]
          /\ gossip = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]

Next == /\ \E i \in 1..N : rumor[i] = TRUE
          /\ \E j \in 1..N : j /= i
          /\ rumor' = [k \in 1..N |-> IF k = j THEN TRUE ELSE rumor[k]]
          /\ gossip' = [k \in 1..N |-> IF k = i THEN gossip[k] + 1 ELSE gossip[k]]
          /\ gossip[i] < ROUNDS
        \/ \E i \in 1..N : gossip[i] >= ROUNDS
          /\ rumor' = rumor
          /\ gossip' = gossip

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<rumor, gossip>>

====

          /\ wants' = wants
        \/ /\ wants[0] = FALSE
          /\ wants[1] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = 1
          /\ wants' = wants
        \/ /\ wants[0] = TRUE
          /\ wants[1] = FALSE
          /\ turn' = 0
          /\ wants' = wants
        \/ /\ wants[0] = TRUE
          /\ wants[1] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = turn
          /\ wants' = wants

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, wants>>

TypeOK == /\ turn \in {0, 1}
           /\ wants \in {<<FALSE, FALSE>>, <<TRUE, FALSE>>, <<FALSE, TRUE>>, <<TRUE, TRUE>>}

spec_preview:
---- MODULE BoundedRetransmissionProtocol ----
EXTENDS Naturals

CONSTANTS NUM_CHUNKS, MAX_RETRIES

VARIABLES chunk, retransmit_count, channel

Init ==
    /\ chunk = 1
    /\ retransmit_count = 0
    /\ channel = {}

Send ==
    /\ channel = {}
    /\ channel' = {chunk}
    /\ retransmit_count' = retransmit_count
    /\ UNCHANGED chunk

Receive ==
    /\ channel # {}
    /\ chunk' = CHOOSE c \in channel : TRUE
    /\ channel' = {}
    /\ retransmit_count' = 0

Timeout ==
    /\ channel # {}
    /\ retransmit_count < MAX_RETRIES
    /\ channel' = channel
    /\ retransmit_count' = retransmit_count + 1

GiveUp ==
    /\ channel # {}
    /\ retransmit_count = MAX_RETRIES
    /\ channel' = channel
    /\ retransmit_count' = retransmit_count

Next == Send \/ Receive \/ Timeout \/ GiveUp

spec_preview:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences

VARIABLES token, state, N
TypeOK == 
    /\ N \in Nat
    /\ N > 0
    /\ token \in 1..N
    /\ state \in [1..N -> {"CS", "NS"}]

(* Initial state *)
Init == 
    /\ token = 1
    /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> IF i = 1 THEN "CS" ELSE "NS"]

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == 
    \E i \in 1..N :

spec_preview:
---- MODULE Barrier ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences

VARIABLES barrierCount, barrierFlag, processStates
CONSTANT N \* Number of processes

(* Types *)
TypeOK == 
    /\ barrierCount \in 0..N
    /\ barrierFlag \in BOOLEAN
    /\ processStates \in Seq(N)

(* Initial state *)
Init == 
    /\ barrierCount = 0
    /\ barrierFlag = FALSE
    /\ processStates = Seq(N)

(* Process action: a process can either wait at the barrier or proceed *)
WaitAtBarrier(i) == 
    /\ i \in 1..N
    /\ processStates[i] = FALSE
    /\ barrierFlag = FALSE
    /\ barrierCount' = barrierCount + 1
    /\ processStates' = [processStates EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
    /\ barrierFlag' = IF barrierCount' = N THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE
    /\ UNCHANGED << barrierCount, barrierFlag, processStates >>

Proceed(i) == 
    /\ i \in 1..N

spec_preview:
---- MODULE Barrier ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences

VARIABLES count, N, proc, state
TypeOK == 
    /\ N \in Nat
    /\ N > 0
    /\ count \in 0..N
    /\ proc \in 1..N
    /\ state \in {"waiting", "proceeding"}

(* Initial state *)
Init == 
    /\ count = 0
    /\ state = "waiting"

(* Process action: a process reaches the barrier *)
ReachBarrier == 
    /\ state = "waiting"
    /\ count' = count + 1
    /\ state' = IF count' = N THEN "proceeding" ELSE "waiting"
    /\ count' <= N

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == 
    /\ proc \in 1..N
    /\ ReachBarrier

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<count, state>>

====

---- MODULE Barrier ----

VARIABLES reached, next, N
TypeOK == 
    /\ N \in Nat
    /\ N > 0
    /\ reached \in SUBSET 1..N
    /\ next \in SUBSET 1..N
    /\ reached \subseteq 1..N
    /\ next \subseteq 1..N
    /\ next \subseteq reached

(* Initial state: no process has reached or passed the barrier *)
Init == 
    /\ reached = {}
    /\ next = {}
    /\ N \in Nat
    /\ N > 0

(* Action for a process p reaching the barrier *)
Reach(p) == 
    /\ p \in 1..N
    /\ ~(p \in reached)
    /\ reached' = reached \cup {p}
    /\ next' = next
    /\ UNCHANGED <<N>>

(* Action for a process p passing the barrier *)
Pass(p) == 
    /\ p \in reached
    /\ ~(p \in next)
    /\ next' = next \cup {p}
    /\ reached' = reached

spec_preview:
---- MODULE BoundedStack ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences

VARIABLES stack, maxCap



Init == /\ stack = <<>>
        /\ maxCap \in Nat
        /\ maxCap > 0

Push == /\ Len(stack) < maxCap
        /\ stack' = Append(stack, 0)
        /\ maxCap' = maxCap

Pop == /\ Len(stack) > 0
       /\ stack' = SubSeq(stack, 1, Len(stack)-1)
       /\ maxCap' = maxCap

Next == Push \/ Pop

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<stack, maxCap>>

TypeOK == /\ stack \in Seq(Nat)
          /\ maxCap \in Nat
          /\ Len(stack) <= maxCap

====

---- MODULE GossipRumor ----
EXTENDS Naturals, FiniteSets, Sequences, TLC

CONSTANTS N, Neighbors

VARIABLES rumorKnown

(* rumorKnown is a set of nodes that know the rumor *)

Init == rumorKnown = {1}

Next == 
  \E node \in rumorKnown :
    \E neighbor \in Neighbors[node] :
      rumorKnown' = rumorKnown \cup {neighbor}

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_rumorKnown

TypeOK == rumorKnown \subseteq 1..N

====

spec_preview:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFO ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

VARIABLES q, N
TypeOK == 
    /\ N \in Nat
    /\ N > 0
    /\ q \in Seq(Nat)
    /\ Len(q) <= N

(* Initial state: empty queue *)
Init == 
    /\ q = <<>>
    /\ N \in Nat
    /\ N > 0

(* Enqueue operation: add element x to the end of the queue *)
Enqueue(x) == 
    /\ Len(q) < N
    /\ q' = Append(q, x)
    /\ UNCHANGED <<N>>

(* Dequeue operation: remove element from the front of the queue *)
Dequeue == 
    /\ Len(q) > 0
    /\ q' = Tail(q)
    /\ UNCHANGED <<N>>

(* Next-state relation: either enqueue or dequeue *)
Next == 
    \E x \in Nat: Enqueue(x)
    \/ Dequeue

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, N>>

====

---- MODULE MultiProducerConsumer ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC, Integers

CONSTANT MaxSize
CONSTANT Producers

VARIABLES buffer, producers

TypeOK == 
   /\ buffer \in Seq(Int)
   /\ producers \in SUBSET Int
   /\ Len(buffer) <= MaxSize

Init == 
   /\ buffer = <<>>
   /\ producers = Producers

Next == 
   \/ (* Producer action *)
      /\ Len(buffer) < MaxSize
      /\ buffer' = Append(buffer, 1)
      /\ UNCHANGED <<producers>>
   \/ (* Consumer action *)
      /\ Len(buffer) > 0
      /\ buffer' = Tail(buffer)
      /\ UNCHANGED <<producers>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<buffer, producers>> /\ TypeOK

====

                /\ full' \in FALSE
                /\ buf' \in 0..0

Next == ProducerWrite \/ ConsumerRead

spec_preview:
---- MODULE SimpleAllocator ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

CONSTANTS Clients, Pages

VARIABLES free, allocated

TypeInvariant == 
  /\ free \subseteq Pages
  /\ allocated \in [Clients -> SUBSET Pages]
  /\ \A c \in Clients : allocated[c] \subseteq Pages
  /\ \A c \in Clients : allocated[c] \subseteq free

Init == 
  /\ free = Pages
  /\ allocated = [c \in Clients |-> {}]
  /\ TypeInvariant

Next == 
  /\ \E c \in Clients : \E p \in Pages :
        /\ p \in free
        /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \cup {p}]
        /\ free' = free \ {p}
        /\ TypeInvariant
  /\ UNCHANGED free
  /\ UNCHANGED allocated

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<free, allocated>>

====

---- MODULE TicketDispenser ----
EXTENDS Naturals, TLC

CONSTANTS MAX

VARIABLES ticketCounter, servedNumber

TypeOK == /\ ticketCounter \in 1..MAX
        /\ servedNumber \in 1..MAX

Init == /\ ticketCounter \in 1..MAX
        /\ servedNumber \in 1..MAX
        /\ ticketCounter = 1
        /\ servedNumber = 1

Next == /\ ticketCounter' = ticketCounter + 1
        /\ servedNumber' = servedNumber + 1
        /\ ticketCounter' \in 1..MAX
        /\ servedNumber' \in 1..MAX
        /\ ticketCounter' > ticketCounter
        /\ servedNumber' > servedNumber

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<ticketCounter, servedNumber>> /\ TypeOK

====

---- MODULE MultiProducerConsumer ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

VARIABLES buffer, producers, consumer
CONSTANT MaxSize, Producers, Consumer

(* TypeOK ensures that buffer is a sequence of integers and that producers and consumer are integers *)
TypeOK == 
  /\ buffer \in Seq(Nat)
  /\ Len(buffer) <= MaxSize
  /\ producers \in SUBSET Nat
  /\ Len(producers) = Len(Producers)
  /\ consumer \in Nat
  /\ consumer = Consumer

(* Init defines the initial state of the system *)
Init == 
  /\ buffer = <<>>
  /\ producers = Producers
  /\ consumer = Consumer

(* ProducerAction allows a producer to add an item to the buffer if it is not full *)
ProducerAction(p) == 
  /\ p \in producers
  /\ Len(buffer) < MaxSize
  /\ buffer' = Append(buffer, p)
  /\ UNCHANGED <<producers, consumer>>

spec_preview:
---- MODULE SimpleAllocator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Clients

Pages == 1..N

VARIABLES free, allocated

Init == /\ free = Pages
        /\ allocated = [c \in Clients |-> {}]

Request(c, req) == 
    /\ req # {}
    /\ req \subseteq free
    /\ free' = free \ req
    /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \cup req]

Allocate(c, req) == 
    /\ req # {}
    /\ req \subseteq Pages
    /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \cup req]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<free>>

Release(c, rel) == 
    /\ rel # {}
    /\ rel \subseteq allocated[c]
    /\ free' = free \cup rel
    /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \rel]

Next == \E c \in Clients : \E req \in SUBSET(Pages) :
            Request(c, req) \/ Allocate(c, req) \/ Release(c, req)

Spec == Init /\ [][Nex

spec_preview:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFO ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES q

(* State space: q is a sequence of at most N elements from 0..N-1 *)
TypeOK == 
    /\ q \in Seq(0..N-1)
    /\ Cardinality(Seq(0..N-1)) <= N

Init == 
    q = <<>>

Enqueue(x) == 
    /\ x \in 0..N-1
    /\ Len(q) < N
    /\ q' = Append(q, x)

Dequeue == 
    /\ Len(q) > 0
    /\ q' = Tail(q)

Next == 
    \/ \E x \in 0..N-1: Enqueue(x)
    \/ Dequeue

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q>>

====

spec_preview:
---- MODULE LeaseProtocol ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANTS N, T \* Number of nodes and lease duration

VARIABLES owner, lease, time

(*
  owner  : node that currently holds the lease (0..N or 0 for none)
  lease  : remaining lease time (0..T)
  time   : global clock (non-negative integer)
*)

(* Helper to represent the set of nodes *)
Nodes == 1..N

(* Initial state: no owner, no lease, time zero *)
Init == /\ owner = 0
        /\ lease = 0
        /\ time = 0

(* Action: a node requests the lease *)
Request(i) == /\ i \in Nodes
              /\ owner = 0
              /\ lease = 0
              /\ owner' = i
              /\ lease' = T
              /\ UNCHANGED time

(* Action: the lease expires *)
Expire == /\ lease > 0
          /\ lease' = lease - 1

---- MODULE Barrier ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANTS N \* Number of processes

VARIABLES arrived, released

(* Type invariant: arrived and released are subsets of 1..N *)
TypeOK == 
    /\ arrived \in SUBSET 1..N
    /\ released \in SUBSET 1..N

(* Initial state: no process has arrived or released *)
Init == 
    /\ arrived = {}
    /\ released = {}

(* Action: a process i arrives at the barrier *)
Arrive(i) == 
    /\ i \in 1..N
    /\ ~(i \in arrived)
    /\ arrived' = arrived \cup {i}

(* Action: all processes release once all have arrived *)
Release == 
    /\ arrived = 1..N
    /\ released' = 1..N

(* Next-state relation: either a process arrives or all release *)
Next == 
    \E i \in 1..N: Arrive(i) 
    \/ Release

---- MODULE LeaseProtocol ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANTS N, T  \* Number of nodes and lease duration

VARIABLES owner, expires, time

(* owner: node id that holds the lease, or 0 if none
   expires: time when the lease expires
   time: current global time *)

(* Helper to model time passing *)
NextTime == time' = time + 1 /\ UNCHANGED <<owner, expires>>

(* Acquire the lease if it is free or expired *)
Acquire(n) ==
  /\ n \in 1..N
  /\ owner = 0 \/ time >= expires
  /\ owner' = n
  /\ expires' = time + T
  /\ time' = time

(* Release the lease *)
Release ==
  /\ owner # 0
  /\ owner' = 0
  /\ expires' = 0
  /\ time' = time

(* STRING node can attempt to acquire or release *)
Next == NextTime \/ \E n \in 1..N: Acquire(n) \/ Release

Init == /\ owner = 0

---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, state

(* State of each philosopher: 0=Thinking, 1=Hungry, 2=Eating *)
State == 0 .. 2

(* Initial state: all thinking, all forks free *)
Init == forks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0] /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]

(* Helper: left and right neighbor indices (circular) *)
Left(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
Right(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

(* Action: philosopher i starts eating if both forks are free *)

  /\ state[i] = 1
  /\ forks[i] = 0
  /\ forks[Right(i)] = 0
  /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = 1, ![Right(i)] = 1]
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = 2]

---- MODULE KVStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANTS K, V

VARIABLES store

(* The state is a partial function from keys to values *)
IsStore(s) == \A k \in DOMAIN s: k \in K /\ s[k] \in V

Init == store = <<>> 

(* Get operation: read the value associated with a key *)
Get(k) == 
  /\ k \in K
  /\ \E v \in V: store[k] = v

(* Put operation: insert or update a key-value pair *)
Put(k, v) == 
  /\ k \in K
  /\ v \in V
  /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]

(* Delete operation: remove a key from the store *)
Delete(k) == 
  /\ k \in K
  /\ k \in DOMAIN store
  /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = @ \in DOMAIN @]

Next == 
  \E k \in K : \E v \in V : Put(k, v) \lor Delete(k)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

*)

Nodes == 1..N

Held(i) == owner = i /\ time < expiry

(* Initialization: no owner, expiry 0, time 0 *)
Init == /\ owner = 0
        /\ expiry = 0
        /\ time = 0

(* Action: a node i acquires the lease if it is free or expired *)

  /\ i \in Nodes
  /\ owner = 0 \/ time >= expiry

spec_preview:
---- MODULE TaskNode ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANTS Node

\* Define the possible states of a node
States == {"Pending", "Running", "Done"}

\* State variable: status of each node
VARIABLE status

\* Initial state: all nodes are Pending
Init == status = [n \in Node |-> "Pending"]

\* Transition: a node can move from Pending to Running
\* or from Running to Done
Next ==
  \E n \in Node :
    /\ status[n] = "Pending" \/ status[n] = "Running"
    /\ status' = [status EXCEPT ![n] = IF status[n] = "Pending" THEN "Running" ELSE "Done"]

\* Spec is the standard temporal formula
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_status

\* Invariant: no node can be in Done before it was Running
TypeOK == \A n \in Node : status[n] \in States

LeaseExpired == owner # 0 /\ time >= expires
NoLease == owner = 0

(* Actions *)
Acquire(i) ==
  /\ IsNode(i)
  /\ NoLease
  /\ owner' = i
  /\ expires' = time + T
  /\ UNCHANGED time

Release(i) ==
  /\ IsNode(i)
  /\ owner = i
  /\ owner' = 0
  /\ UNCHANGED <<expires, time>>

Tick ==
  /\ time' = time + 1
  /\ UNCHANGED <<owner, expires>>

Next ==
  \E i \in 1..N :
    Acquire(i) \/ Release(i) \/ Tick

---- MODULE LamportsBakeryAlgorithm ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES num, flag

(* num[i] is the ticket number of process i, 0 means not in bakery *)
(* flag[i] is TRUE if process i is choosing a number *)

vars == <<num, flag>>

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

(* Process i chooses a ticket *)
Choose(i) ==
  /\ flag[i] = FALSE
  /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
  /\ LET maxNum == CHOOSE m \in 1..N : num[m] = Max({num[j] : j \in 1..N})
     IN num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = maxNum + 1]

(* Process i leaves the bakery *)
Leave(i) ==
  /\ num[i] = 1
  /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 0]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<flag>>

(* Process i is in the critical section *)
InCS(i) ==
  /\

---- MODULE TicketDispenser ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANTS MAX

VARIABLES next, served

(* next: next ticket number to issue (1..MAX+1, MAX+1 means no more tickets)
   served: number of tickets served so far (0..MAX) *)

Init ==
    /\ next = 1
    /\ served = 0

Next ==
    \/ (* Issue next ticket *)
       /\ next <= MAX
       /\ next' = next + 1
       /\ served' = served
    \/ (* Serve a ticket *)
       /\ next > served
       /\ served' = served + 1
       /\ next' = next
    \/ (* All tickets served *)
       /\ next > MAX
       /\ served' = served
       /\ next' = next

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<next, served>>

TypeOK ==
    /\ next \in 1..MAX+1
    /\ served \in 0..MAX

---- MODULE VendingMachine ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Items, Prices

(* Items is a set of items the machine sells.
   Prices is a function from Items to Nat giving the price of each item. *)

VARIABLES balance, inventory, history

(* balance: current amount of money inserted
   inventory: mapping from items to available stock

Nodes == 1..N

(* Predicate: a node is eligible to acquire the lease *)
Eligible(n) == owner = 0 \/ time >= leaseEnd

Acquire(n) ==

spec_preview:
---- MODULE Peterson ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS P1, P2

VARIABLES flag, turn

(* flag is a function from {P1, P2} to BOOLEAN
   turn is either P1 or P2 *)

Init == 
    /\ flag = [P1 |-> FALSE, P2 |-> FALSE]
    /\ turn = P1

Next == 
    \/ (* Process P1 enters critical section *)
       /\ flag[P1] = FALSE
       /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![P1] = TRUE]
       /\ turn' = P2
       /\ UNCHANGED << flag, turn >>
    \/ (* Process P2 enters critical section *)
       /\ flag[P2] = FALSE
       /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![P2] = TRUE]
       /\ turn' = P1
       /\ UNCHANGED << flag, turn >>
    \/ (* Both processes exit critical section *)
       /\ flag' = [P1 |-> FALSE, P2 |-> FALSE]
       /\ UNCHANGED turn

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, turn>>

====

---- MODULE Peterson ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

VARIABLES turn, flag

(* Flag[i] indicates whether process i wants to enter the critical section.
   Turn indicates which process has priority. *)

Init == /\ turn = 0
        /\ flag = <<FALSE, FALSE>>

Next == \/ (* Process 0 attempts to enter *)
           /\ flag' = <<TRUE, flag[2]>>
           /\ turn' = 1
           /\ flag' = <<FALSE, flag[2]>> (* exit *)
        \/ (* Process 1 attempts to enter *)
           /\ flag' = <<flag[1], TRUE>>
           /\ turn' = 0
           /\ flag' = <<flag[1], FALSE>> (* exit *)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, flag>>

---- MODULE LamportsBakeryAlgorithm ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES num, flag

(* Type definition for process identifiers *)
Proc == 1 .. N

(* Helper: ordering on (number, process) pairs *)
LessThan(p, q) == num[p] < num[q] \/ (num[p] = num[q] /\ p < q)

(* Initial state: all processes have number 0 and are not choosing *)
Init == /\ num = [i \in Proc |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in Proc |-> FALSE]

(* Action: process i starts choosing a number *)
Choosing(i) ==
  /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
  /\ UNCHANGED num

(* Action: process i finishes choosing a number *)
FinishedChoosing(i) ==
  LET maxNum == CHOOSE m \in 1..N : \A j \in Proc : num[j] <= m
  IN /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = maxNum + 1]
      /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]

---- MODULE MinMaxTracker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANT n

VARIABLES min, max, seen

(* Type predicate for the state variables *)
TypeOK == 
    /\ min \in 1..n
    /\ max \in 1..n
    /\ seen \in 1..n

(* Initial state: no values seen yet, min and max are undefined *)
Init == 
    /\ min = 1
    /\ max = 1
    /\ seen = 1

(* Transition relation: process a new value x from the stream *)
Next == 
    \E x \in 1..n:
        /\ seen' = seen + 1
        /\ min' = IF x < min THEN x ELSE min
        /\ max' = IF x > max THEN x ELSE max

(* Spec: initial state and next-state relation *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<min, max, seen>>

====

spec_preview:
---- MODULE Elevator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N \* Number of floors, 1..N

VARIABLES pos, dir, req

(*
  pos  : current floor (1..N)
  dir  : direction of movement, 1 (up) or -1 (down)
  req  : set of floors with pending requests
*)

(* Helper predicates *)
WithinBounds(f) == 1 <= f /\ f <= N
AtTop == pos = N
AtBottom == pos = 1
GoingUp == dir = 1
GoingDown == dir = -1

(* Initial state: at floor 1, going up, no requests *)
Init == /\ pos = 1
        /\ dir = 1
        /\ req = {}

(* Request a floor *)
Request(f) == /\ WithinBounds(f)
                /\ ~(f \in req)
                /\ f # pos
                /\ f \in 1..N

(* Elevator movement *)
Move ==
  LET nextFloor == IF GoingUp THEN pos + 1 ELSE pos - 1 IN
  /\ pos' = nextFloor
  /\ dir' = dir
  /\ req

(* Items is a set of item identifiers.
   Prices is a function from Items to Nat, giving the cost of each item. *)

VARIABLES balance, inventory, dispensed

(* balance: current amount of money inserted (in cents)
   inventory: mapping from items to quantities available
   dispensed: set of items dispensed in the current transaction *)

(* Helper to check if an item is available for purchase *)
Available(item) == inventory[item] > 0

(* Helper to check if the user can afford an item *)
CanAfford(item) == balance >= Prices[item]

(* Action: insert a coin of given value *)
InsertCoin(v) == /\ v \in {5, 10, 25}  \* allowed coin denominations
                /\ balance' = balance + v

CONSTANTS Items, Prices

(* Items is a set of item identifiers.
   Prices is a function from Items to Nat, giving the price of each item. *)

VARIABLE balance, dispensed

   dispensed: the sequence of items that have been dispensed so far *)

CanAfford(item) == balance >= Prices[item]

(* Helper action: insert a coin of a given value *)

                 /\ balance' = balance + v

Dispense(item) == CanAfford(item)
                 /\ dispensed' = Append(dispensed, item)

---- MODULE LeaseProtocol ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANTS N, T, MaxTime

VARIABLES owner, time, state

(* State values: "idle", "requesting", "acquiring", "acquired", "releasing" *)

StateVals == {"idle", "requesting", "acquiring", "acquired", "releasing"}

Init == /\ owner = 0
        /\ time = 0
        /\ state \in [1..N -> StateVals]

Acquire(n) == /\ state[n] = "idle"
              /\ owner' = n
              /\ time' = 1
              /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![n] = "acquired"]

Release(n) == /\ state[n] = "acquired"
              /\ owner' = 0
              /\ time' = 0
              /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![n] = "idle"]

Tick == /\ time' = time + 1
        /\ UNCHANGED <<owner, state>>

Next == \E n \in 1..N :
          \/ Acquire(n)
          \/ Re

(* Variables *)

(* Helper predicates *)
ItemAvailable == Item \in 1..5
ValidPrice == Price \in 1..10

(* Initial state: no balance, nothing dispensed *)
Init == /\ balance = 0
        /\ dispensed = {}

(* Transition: insert a coin (1..5) *)
InsertCoin == 
  \E c \in 1..5 :
    /\ balance' = balance + c
    /\ dispensed' = dispensed

(* Transition: dispense an item if enough balance *)
Dispense ==
  \E i \in 1..5 :
    /\ balance >= Price
    /\ dispensed' = dispensed \cup {i}
    /\ balance' = balance - Price

(* Next-state relation: either insert a coin or dispense an item *)
Next == InsertCoin \/ Dispense

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<balance, di

---- MODULE LeaseProtocol ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANTS N, T, MAX_TIME

(* Variables *)
VARIABLES owner, lease_start, lease_expiry, time

(* Helper predicates *)
IsOwner(i) == owner = i
LeaseActive == lease_start # 0 /\ time < lease_expiry
LeaseExpired == lease_start # 0 /\ time >= lease_expiry

(* Initialization *)
Init == /\ owner = 0
        /\ lease_start = 0
        /\ lease_expiry = 0
        /\ time = 0

(* Actions *)
Acquire(i) ==
  /\ IsOwner(i)
  /\ LeaseActive
  /\ lease_expiry' = lease_expiry
  /\ UNCHANGED <<owner, lease_start, time>>

Release(i) ==
  /\ IsOwner(i)
  /\ LeaseActive
  /\ owner' = 0
  /\ lease_start' = 0
  /\ lease_expiry' = 0
  /\ UNCHANGED time

Renew(i) ==
  /\ IsOwner(i)
  /\ LeaseActive
  /\ lease_expiry' = lease_expiry + T

(* Initial state: all processes have number 0 and are not choosing *)

        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

(* Helper predicate: process i is in the critical section *)
InCS(i) == num[i] > 0

(* Helper predicate: process i is in the choosing phase *)
Choosing(i) == flag[i]

(* Helper predicate: process j has priority over i *)
Priority(j, i) ==
  /\ num[j] < num[i]
  \/ /\ num[j] = num[i]

spec_preview:
---- MODULE LamportsBakeryAlgorithm ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES num, flag

(* num[i] is the ticket number of process i; 0 means not in bakery *)
(* flag[i] is TRUE iff process i is in the choosing phase *)

vars == <<num, flag>>

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

(* Helper: maximum ticket number among all processes *)
maxTicket == CHOOSE m \in Nat : \A i \in 1..N : num[i] <= m /\ \E j \in 1..N : num[j] = m

(* Process i enters critical section *)
Enter(i) ==
  /\ flag[i] = FALSE
  /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
  /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = maxTicket + 1]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<num, flag>>

(* Process i leaves critical section *)
Exit(i) ==
  /\ flag[i] = TRUE
  /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 0]
  /\ UNCHAN

spec_preview:
---- MODULE Semaphore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES count, proc

(* Domain of processes *)
ProcSet == 1 .. 10

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == 
    /\ count \in 0..N
    /\ proc \in ProcSet

(* Initial state: semaphore count at N, no process holds it *)
Init == 
    /\ count = N
    /\ proc = 0

(* Action: a process acquires the semaphore if count > 0 *)
Acquire == 
    /\ proc' = proc + 1
    /\ proc \in ProcSet
    /\ count > 0
    /\ count' = count - 1

(* Action: a process releases the semaphore *)
Release == 
    /\ proc' = proc + 1
    /\ proc \in ProcSet
    /\ count' = count + 1

(* Next-state relation: either acquire or release *)
Next == Acquire \/ Release

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<count, proc>>

====

spec_preview:
---- MODULE Semaphore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES count, proc

(* Types *)
TypeOK == 
    /\ count \in 0..N
    /\ proc \in 1..N

(* Initial state: semaphore count is N, no process holds it *)
Init == 
    /\ count = N
    /\ proc = {}

(* Process actions *)
Acquire == 
    \E p \in 1..N :
        /\ ~(p \in proc)
        /\ count > 0
        /\ proc' = proc \cup {p}
        /\ count' = count - 1

Release == 
    \E p \in proc :
        /\ proc' = proc \ {p}
        /\ count' = count + 1

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == Acquire \/ Release

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<count, proc>>

====

---- MODULE DekkersAlgorithm ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS P1, P2
ASSUME P1 # P2

VARIABLES turn, wants

(* wants: [P1, P2 -> BOOLEAN] maps each process to whether it wants to enter CS *)
(* turn: one of P1, P2 indicating whose turn it is *)

(* Initial state: no process wants to enter CS, and turn is arbitrary *)
Init == /\ wants = [p \in {P1, P2} |-> FALSE]
        /\ turn \in {P1, P2}

(* Actions for process P1 *)
P1Enter ==
  /\ wants[P1] = FALSE
  /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![P1] = TRUE]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<turn>>

P1Exit ==
  /\ wants[P1] = TRUE
  /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![P1] = FALSE]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<turn>>

(* Actions for process P2 *)

---- MODULE BoundedRetransmissionProtocol ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, MAX_RETRIES

(* Variables *)
VARIABLES sent, acked, retrans, time, hasn

(* Helper predicates *)
Sent(i) == i \in sent
Acked(i) == i \in acked
Retrans(i) == retrans[i]

(* Initial state: nothing sent, no acks, zero retransmissions, time 0 *)
Init == /\ sent = {}
        /\ acked = {}
        /\ retrans = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ time = 0

(* Action: send a new chunk if not yet sent *)
Send(i) == /\ i \in 1..N
           /\ ~Sent(i)
           /\ sent' = sent \cup {i}
           /\ acked' = acked
           /\ retrans' = [retrans EXCEPT ![i] = Retrans(i) + 1]
           /\ time' = time + 1

(* Action: receive an ACK for a sent chunk *)
Ack(i) == /\ i \in sent
           /\ ~Acked(i)

---- MODULE KVStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANTS Keys, Values, NULL

(* The state is a partial function from Keys to Values *)
VARIABLES store

(* Initial state: empty store *)
Init == store = [k \in Keys |-> NULL]

(* Helper to check if a key is present *)
HasKey(k) == store[k] # NULL

(* Get operation: read value of key k (no state change) *)
Get(k) == /\ k \in Keys
          /\ HasKey(k)

(* Put operation: insert or update key k with value v *)
Put(k, v) ==
  /\ k \in Keys
  /\ v \in Values
  /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]

(* Delete operation: remove key k from the store *)
Delete(k) ==
  /\ k \in Keys
  /\ HasKey(k)
  /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = NULL]

(* Next-state relation: any of the three operations may occur *)
Next == \/ \E k \in Keys :

---- MODULE RingLeader ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N
CONSTANT Ids

(* Each process has a unique ID *)
ASSUME UniqueIds == \A i, j \in 1..N : i /= j => Ids[i] /= Ids[j]

VARIABLES state, leader, active

(* States: "idle", "elected", "leader" *)
States == {"idle", "elected", "leader"}

Init == /\ state \in [1..N -> States]
        /\ leader = 0
        /\ active = 1..N
        /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "idle"]

Next == \E i \in active :
          \/ (* Process i initiates election *)
             /\ state[i] = "idle"
             /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "elected"]
          \/ (* Process i becomes leader if it has highest ID among active *)
             /\ state[i] = "elected"
             /\ \A j \in active : Ids[i] > Ids[j]
             /\ state' = [sta

---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, nodes

VARIABLES token, cs

Init == /\ token \in nodes
        /\ cs = [n \in nodes |-> FALSE]

Next == /\ token' = CHOOSE n \in nodes : n # token
        /\ cs' = [cs EXCEPT ![token] = FALSE, ![token'] = TRUE]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token, cs>>

---- MODULE SimpleCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES participants, votes, state

Init == /\ participants = 1..N
        /\ votes = [p \in participants |-> "undecided"]
        /\ state = "init"

Next == 
    \/ /\ state = "init"
       /\ \E p \in participants :
            /\ state' = "voting"
            /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![p] = "yes"]
    \/ /\ state = "voting"
       /\ \E p \in participants :
            /\ state' = "voting"
            /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![p] = "no"]
    \/ /\ state = "voting"
       /\ state' = "commit"
       /\ votes' = votes
    \/ /\ state = "commit"
       /\ state' = "commit"
       /\ votes' = votes
    \/ /\ state = "abort"
       /\ state' = "abort"
       /\ votes' = votes

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<p

---- MODULE VendingMachine ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Item, Price

VARIABLES balance, inventory

Init == /\ balance = 0
        /\ inventory = [i \in Item |-> 1]

Next == \/ \E coin \in 1..5:
            /\ balance' = balance + coin
            /\ inventory' = inventory
        \/ \E i \in Item:
            /\ balance >= Price[i]
            /\ balance' = balance - Price[i]
            /\ inventory' = [inventory EXCEPT ![i] = @ - 1]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<balance, inventory>>

====

spec_preview:
---- MODULE RingLeader ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, IDs

(* Each process has a unique ID from the set IDs *)
ASSUME UniqueIDs == \A i, j \in 1..N : i /= j => IDs[i] /= IDs[j]

VARIABLES leader, state

(* State can be "elected" or "not elected" *)
TypeOK == leader \in 1..N /\ state \in [1..N -> {"elected", "not elected"}]

Init == leader = 1 /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "not elected"]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ leader' = i
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "elected"]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<leader, state>>

====

spec_preview:
---- MODULE LamportsBakeryAlgorithm ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANT N

VARIABLES num, flag

vars == <<num, flag>>

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E self \in 1..N :
          \/ /\ flag[self] = FALSE
              /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![self] = TRUE]
              /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![self] = Max(num) + 1]
              /\ UNCHANGED <<num, flag>>
          \/ /\ flag[self] = TRUE
              /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![self] = FALSE]
              /\ UNCHANGED <<num, flag>>

Spec == Init /\ []([Next]_vars)

TypeOK == /\ num \in [1..N -> Nat]
          /\ flag \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]

====

          /\ inventory \in [Item -> Nat]
          /\ dispensed \in [Item -> Nat]

        /\ inventory = [i \in Item |-> 10]
        /\ dispensed = [i \in Item |-> 0]

             /\ UNCHANGED <<inventory, dispensed>>

Dispense(item) == /\ balance >= ItemPrice
                 /\ inventory[item] > 0
                 /\ balance' = balance - ItemPrice
                 /\ inventory' = [inventory EXCEPT ![item] = @ - 1]
                 /\ dispensed' = [dispensed EXCEPT ![item] = @ + 1]

spec_preview:
---- MODULE RingLeader ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N, IDs

VARIABLES ring, leader

(* Each process has a unique ID *)
TypeOK == ring \in [1..N -> IDs] /\ leader \in 1..N

(* Initial state: leader is undefined (0) *)
Init == leader = 0

(* Each process sends its ID to its neighbor *)
Send(i) == ring[i] = ring[%(i, N) + 1]

(* Each process updates the leader if it has a higher ID *)
Update(i) == leader' = IF ring[i] > ring[leader] THEN i ELSE leader

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == \E i \in 1..N : Send(i) /\ Update(i)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<ring, leader>>

====

spec_preview:
---- MODULE RingLeader ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANTS N, IDs

(* Each process has a unique ID *)
ASSUME UniqueIDs == \A i, j \in 1..N : (i # j) => IDs[i] # IDs[j]

VARIABLES leader, state

(* State can be "elected" or "not elected" *)
TypeOK == leader \in 1..N /\ state \in [1..N -> {"elected", "not elected"}]

Init == leader = 1 /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "not elected"]

Next == /\ leader' = CHOOSE i \in 1..N : IDs[i] = Max(IDs)
        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![leader'] = "elected"]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<leader, state>>

====

spec_preview:
---- MODULE DistLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Nodes

VARIABLES lock, holder

Init == lock = 0 /\ holder = {}

TypeOK == lock \in 1..N /\ holder \in SUBSET Nodes

Acquire(n) == 
  /\ lock = 0
  /\ lock' = n
  /\ holder' = {n}
  /\ UNCHANGED <<holder>>

Release(n) == 
  /\ lock = n
  /\ lock' = 0
  /\ holder' = {}
  /\ UNCHANGED <<holder>>

Next == \E n \in Nodes: Acquire(n) \/ Release(n)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<lock, holder>>

====

TypeOK == leader \in 1..N /\ state \in [1..N -> {"idle", "elected", "leader"}]

Init == leader = 1 /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "idle"]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          \/ state[i] = "idle" /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "elected"]
          \/ state[i] = "elected" /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "leader"]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<leader, state>>

        /\ prod = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]

  \/ \E i \in 1..N :
       /\ prod[i] < M
       /\ buf' = Append(buf, i)
       /\ prod' = [prod EXCEPT ![i] = @ + 1]
  \/ /\ Len(buf) > 0
      /\ buf' = SubSeq(buf, 1, Len(buf)-1)
      /\ prod' = prod

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<buf, prod>>

  /\ balance \in Nat
  /\ dispensed \in Item

(* Initial state *)

  /\ balance = 0
  /\ dispensed = {}

(* Transition relation *)
Next ==
  \/ \E coin \in Nat :
        /\ coin > 0
        /\ balance' = balance + coin
        /\ dispensed' = dispensed
  \/ \E item \in Item :
        /\ balance >= Price[item]
        /\ balance' = balance - Price[item]
        /\ dispensed' = dispensed \cup {item}

Spec ==
  Init /\ [][Next]_<<balance, dispensed>>

          /\ inventory \in [1..10 -> Nat]

        /\ inventory = [i \in 1..10 |-> 10]

Next == \/ (* Insert a coin *)
           /\ \E coin \in 1..5:
              /\ balance' = balance + coin
              /\ inventory' = inventory

           /\ \E item \in 1..10:
              /\ inventory[item] > 0
              /\ balance' = balance - ItemPrice
              /\ inventory' = [inventory EXCEPT ![item] = @ - 1]
       \/ (* Return change *)
           /\ balance > 0

---- MODULE BoundedStack ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS MaxSize

VARIABLES stack, top

TypeOK ==
    /\ stack \in Seq(1..MaxSize)
    /\ top \in 0..MaxSize

Init ==
    /\ stack = <<>>
    /\ top = 0

Push(x) ==
    /\ top < MaxSize
    /\ stack' = Append(stack, x)
    /\ top' = top + 1
    /\ UNCHANGED <<top>>

Pop ==
    /\ top > 0
    /\ stack' = SubSeq(stack, 1, top - 1)
    /\ top' = top - 1
    /\ UNCHANGED <<top>>

Next ==
    \/ Push(1)
    \/ Pop

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<stack, top>>

====

spec_preview:
---- MODULE BoundedStack ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANT N
ASSUME N \in Nat

VARIABLES stack, top

TypeOK == /\ stack \in Seq(1..N)
          /\ top \in 0..N
          /\ Len(stack) = top

Init == /\ stack = <<>>
        /\ top = 0

Push(x) == /\ top < N
           /\ stack' = Append(stack, x)
           /\ top' = top + 1
           /\ UNCHANGED <<top>>

Pop == /\ top > 0
       /\ stack' = SubSeq(stack, 1, top - 1)
       /\ top' = top - 1
       /\ UNCHANGED <<top>>

Next == \/ Push(1)
        \/ Pop

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<stack, top>>

====

spec_preview:
---- MODULE RingLeader ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, IDs

ASSUME N \in 1..10
ASSUME IDs \subseteq 1..100
ASSUME Cardinality(IDs) = N

VARIABLES state, leader

TypeOK == /\ state \in [1..N -> {"idle", "active", "leader"}]
          /\ leader \in 1..N \cup {0}

Init == /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "idle"]
        /\ leader = 0

Next == \/ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ state[i] = "idle"
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "active"]
          /\ UNCHANGED leader
        \/ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ state[i] = "active"
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "leader"]
          /\ leader' = i
        \/ leader' = leader
          /\ state' = state

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, leader>>

====

vars == <<num, flag>>

TypeOK ==
  /\ num \in [1..N -> 1..N]
  /\ flag \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]

        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next ==
  \E i \in 1..N :
    /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
    /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = CHOOSE j \in 1..N : \A k \in 1..N : num[k] < j \/ (num[k] = j /\ k < i)]
    /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<num, flag>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

====

spec_preview:
---- MODULE LeaseProtocol ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, T

VARIABLES owner, lease, time, state

TypeOK == /\ owner \in 1..N
          /\ lease \in 1..N
          /\ time \in 0..T
          /\ state \in {"idle", "acquiring", "holding"}

Init == /\ owner = 1
        /\ lease = 1
        /\ time = 0
        /\ state = "idle"

Acquire == /\ state = "idle"
           /\ state' = "acquiring"

Hold == /\ state = "acquiring"
        /\ state' = "holding"

Release == /\ state = "holding"
           /\ state' = "idle"

Next == \/ Acquire
        \/ Hold
        \/ Release

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<owner, lease, time, state>>
====

---- MODULE RingLeader ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANT N, IDs
ASSUME N \in 1..10
ASSUME IDs \subseteq 1..100
ASSUME Cardinality(IDs) = N

VARIABLES state, leader, round

TypeOK == /\ state \in 0..N
          /\ leader \in 1..100
          /\ round \in 0..N

Init == /\ state = 0
        /\ leader = 0
        /\ round = 0

Next == /\ state' = state + 1
        /\ leader' = IF state' = N THEN Max(IDs) ELSE leader
        /\ round' = round + 1
        /\ UNCHANGED <<state, leader, round>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, leader, round>>

====

---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES token, state

TypeOK == /\ token \in 0..N-1
          /\ state \in [0..N-1 -> {"idle", "critical"}]

Init == /\ token = 0
        /\ \A i \in 0..N-1: state[i] = "idle"

Next == 
    /\ token' = (token + 1) % N
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![token] = "critical"]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<state>>

---- MODULE RingLeader ----

Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANT N

VARIABLES ids, leader, state

TypeOK ==
    /\ ids \in [1..N -> 1..N]
    /\ leader \in 1..N
    /\ state \in [1..N -> {"idle", "active", "leader"}]

Init ==
    /\ ids = [i \in 1..N |-> i]
    /\ leader = 1
    /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "idle"]

Next ==
    /\ leader' = Max(ids)
    /\ state' = [i \in 1..N |-> IF ids[i] = leader' THEN "leader" ELSE "idle"]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<ids, leader, state>>

          /\ procId \in 1..N

        /\ procId = 1

        /\ leader' = IF state' > leader THEN state' ELSE leader
        /\ procId' = IF state' > N THEN 1 ELSE state'

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, leader, procId>>

spec_preview:
---- MODULE Elevator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES pos, dir, req

TypeOK == /\ pos \in 0..N
          /\ dir \in {"up", "down", "idle"}
          /\ req \in SUBSET 0..N

Init == /\ pos = 0
        /\ dir = "idle"
        /\ req = {}

Move == /\ dir = "up" /\ pos < N
        /\ pos' = pos + 1
        /\ dir' = dir
        /\ req' = req

MoveDown == /\ dir = "down" /\ pos > 0
             /\ pos' = pos - 1
             /\ dir' = dir
             /\ req' = req

Open == /\ pos \in req
        /\ req' = req \ {pos}
        /\ dir' = IF req' = {} THEN "idle" ELSE dir

Idle == /\ dir = "idle"
        /\ req' = req
        /\ pos' = pos

Next == \/ Move
        \/ MoveDown
        \/ Open
        \/ Idle

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<pos, dir, req>>

====

---- MODULE RingLeader ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N, IDs

ASSUME N \in 1..10
ASSUME IDs \subseteq 1..100
ASSUME Cardinality(IDs) = N

VARIABLES state, leader

TypeOK == /\ state \in [1..N -> {"idle", "active", "leader"}]
          /\ leader \in 1..N \cup {0}

Init == /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "idle"]
        /\ leader = 0

Next == \/ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ state[i] = "idle"
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "active"]
          /\ UNCHANGED leader
        \/ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ state[i] = "active"
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "leader"]
          /\ leader' = i
          /\ UNCHANGED leader
        \/ leader' = leader
          /\ state' = state

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, leader>>

spec_preview:
---- MODULE LamportsBakeryAlgorithm ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES num, flag

vars == <<num, flag>>

TypeOK == num \in [1..N -> 1..N] /\ flag \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 1]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
            /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
            /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = CHOOSE j \in 1..N : num[j] = 1]
            /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]
            /\ UNCHANGED <<num, flag>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

====

---- MODULE RingLeader ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANT N
ASSUME N \in 1..10

VARIABLES state, leader, round, ids

TypeOK == /\ state \in 0..N
          /\ leader \in 0..N
          /\ round \in 0..N
          /\ ids \in [1..N -> 1..N]

Init == /\ state = 0
        /\ leader = 0
        /\ round = 0
        /\ ids = [i \in 1..N |-> i]

Next == /\ state' = state + 1
        /\ leader' = IF state = N THEN state ELSE leader
        /\ round' = round + 1
        /\ ids' = ids

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, leader, round, ids>>

====

spec_preview:
---- MODULE RingLeader ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES ids, leader, round, active

TypeOK == /\ ids \in [1..N -> 1..N]
          /\ leader \in 1..N
          /\ round \in 0..N
          /\ active \in 1..N

Init == /\ ids = [i \in 1..N |-> i]
        /\ leader = 0
        /\ round = 0
        /\ active = 1

Next == 
  LET 
    nextLeader == IF ids[active] > ids[leader] THEN ids[active] ELSE ids[leader]
    nextActive == IF active < N THEN active + 1 ELSE 1
  IN
    /\ leader' = nextLeader
    /\ round' = round + 1
    /\ active' = nextActive
    /\ UNCHANGED ids

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<ids, leader, round, active>>

====
